positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical geometric mandala pattern featuring stylized celestial flora and constellations. The design utilizes intricate linework, clean silhouettes, and strong negative space contrast. Primary colors should be deep indigo, sapphire blue, vibrant magenta, and accented with metallic gold foil elements. The composition must be perfectly centered, radiating outward like a mystical tapestry. Style should be a blend of Neo-Sacred Geometry and Art Deco illustration, suitable for printing on dark apparel. High contrast, maximalist detail, vector quality, symmetrical composition, luminous glow, 8k resolution.
negative: blurry, noise, lowres, artifacts, smudges, watermarks, text, signature, watermark, logo, poor anatomy, deformed, malformed, extra limbs, messy, grunge, photo-realistic, monochrome, gradient, flat colors
